zitadel.settings.v1.SMTPNoAuth.title: SMTPNoAuth
zitadel.settings.v1.SMTPNoAuth.description: SMTPNoAuth can be used when no authentication is required for the SMTP connection.

zitadel.settings.v1.SMTPPlainAuth.title: SMTPPlainAuth
zitadel.settings.v1.SMTPPlainAuth.description:
SMTPPlainAuth adds plain authentication to the smtp connection. The username of the parent configuration is used in
 combination with the password in this message.

tokenEndpoint.title: token_endpoint
tokenEndpoint.description: token_endpoint is the endpoint from which a token will be requested according to the oauth2 specification.

scopes.title: scopes
scopes.description:
scopes is a list of scopes which should be requested from the authorization service. To authorize a token to
 use the smtp functionality, the server requires a specific scope. These scopes can be found in the documentation
 of the provider.

zitadel.settings.v1.SMTPXOAuth2Auth.title: SMTPXOAuth2Auth
zitadel.settings.v1.SMTPXOAuth2Auth.description:
SMTPXOAuth2Auth adds XOAut2 authentication to the smtp connection. The username of the parent configuration is used
 in combination with the other parameters of this message.

zitadel.settings.v1.SMTPXOAuth2Auth.Clie.title: ClientCredentials
zitadel.settings.v1.SMTPXOAuth2Auth.Clie.description:
ClientCredentials authenticates the SMTP client using Oauth 2.0 Client Credentials grant.
 https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6749#section-4.4

enableIframeEmbedding.title: enable_iframe_embedding
enableIframeEmbedding.description: states if iframe embedding is enabled or disabled

allowedOrigins.title: allowed_origins
allowedOrigins.description: origins allowed loading Zitadel in an iframe if enable_iframe_embedding is true

enableImpersonation.title: enable_impersonation
enableImpersonation.description: allows users to impersonate other users. The impersonator needs the appropriate `*_IMPERSONATOR` roles assigned as well"

sequence.title: sequence
sequence.description:
sequence represents the order of events. It's always counting

 on read: the sequence of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description:
creation_date is the timestamp where the first operation on the object was made

 on read: the timestamp of the first event of the object

 on create: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description:
change_date is the timestamp when the object was changed

 on read: the timestamp of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the

resourceOwner.title: resource_owner
resourceOwner.description: resource_owner is the organization an object belongs to
